subject: WM-0182 blocked
body: Required canonical hash coverage changes GameSession hashes, but pnpm quality now fails the hardcoded golden in packages/sim-worker/src/game-session-worker.test.ts (expected 0x5c850f07/0x33affcde; actual 0x794ba2ff/0x026c716c). That file is outside WM-0182 allowedPaths. Please expand allowedPaths for this exact golden-only test update or provide an approved contract resolution; weakening ReservationLedger hash coverage would violate WM-0182 acceptance.
